metrics.name: d+_density_error_integral
metrics.notes: Accepted-step controller integral history stays close to the reference dense-history restart integral.

metrics.name: density_feedback_src_mult_d+
metrics.notes: Controller source multiplier tracks the reference one-step controller surface.

metrics.name: density_feedback_src_p_d+
metrics.notes: Controller proportional term remains close to the reference dense-history controller state.

metrics.name: density_feedback_src_i_d+
metrics.notes: Controller integral term remains close to the reference dense-history controller state.

metrics.name: Sd_target_recycle
metrics.notes: Target recycling source history stays bounded on the same controlled one-step history.

metrics.name: Sd+_feedback
metrics.notes: Density-feedback source stays exactly zero when the configured source shape is zero.
